prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `5b6cbef5`.
codex_response:
Implemented `5b6cbef5` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: treat the 4x4 input as both the pattern and the placement mask, and copy the full input pattern into each 4x4 block of the 16x16 output wherever the corresponding input cell is nonzero. The summary hint was used because it matched all official examples; no extra primitive was needed.

The generator stays in-family by producing 4x4 two-color patterns with one foreground color and moderate occupancy, then deriving outputs by the same self-tiling construction as the official task.
